layout.title: OpenAppCLI - Universal Application Automation Platform + AI Agent Interaction Standard
layout.description: OpenAppCLI enables any application to be easily controlled and automated through command line and AI Agent. Support Web, desktop, mobile and game applications, achieving Not Only Website, Not Only Data Collection.

hero.title: Not Only Website, Not Only Data Collection
hero.subtitle: From Web Automation to Universal Platform, from Data Collection to Application Control
hero.description: OpenAppCLI is the first platform that enables AI Agents to directly operate any application. Through MCP protocol, we establish the standard bridge for AI Agent and application interaction.

features.title: Core Breakthroughs
features.subtitle: From limitations to breakthroughs, from tools to platforms

items.title: Not Only Website: Universal Platform Automation
items.description: From Web + Electron to Desktop + Mobile + Game, achieving true universal application automation. OpenAppCLI breaks through browser limitations to provide comprehensive automation across all application types.

items.title: Not Only Data Collection: Bidirectional Control
items.description: From one-way data extraction to two-way application control, enabling AI Agents to fully manipulate application behavior. Transform from passive monitoring to active control.

items.title: AI Agent Native Integration
items.description: Through MCP protocol, any AI Agent can directly operate any application, establishing the application interaction standard for the AI era. Seamless integration between intelligence and automation.

platforms.title: Universal Platform Support
platforms.subtitle: One platform supports all application types
platforms.p1: One platform supports all application types

items.name: Web & Electron Applications
items.description: 50+ site adapters, browser reuse, anti-detection mechanisms. Comprehensive web automation with modern browser support and extension integration.

items.name: Desktop Applications
items.description: Windows/macOS/Linux, system-level access, OCR recognition. Native desktop automation with full system integration and intelligent element recognition.

items.name: Mobile Applications
items.description: Android/iOS, UIAutomator, Frida instrumentation. Complete mobile automation framework supporting both native and hybrid applications.

items.name: Game Applications
items.description: Unity/Unreal, anti-cheat bypass, memory access. Advanced game automation with engine-specific optimizations and memory manipulation capabilities.

about.title: Experience AI Agent Direct Application Interaction
about.subtitle: Seamless AI Agent and application interaction
about.p1: Through MCP protocol, AI Agents can directly call OpenAppCLI tools and resources, achieving reliable application automation.
about.p2: Examples include Bilibili hot videos extraction, Instagram auto-like, Genshin daily quests completion.
about.p3: AI Agents can understand user intent and automatically execute application operations.

items.title: Discover Applications
items.description: Find all automatable applications in the system
items.result: Returns list of available applications with metadata

items.title: Execute Automation
items.description: Execute predefined automation tasks on any application
items.result: Executes automation and returns success status

items.title: Extract Data
items.result: Returns structured JSON data from application

cta.title: Start Your AI Automation Journey
cta.subtitle: Join the Universal Platform Revolution
cta.description: Experience the power of Not Only Website, Not Only Data Collection. Download OpenAppCLI and start automating everything.
cta.imageAlt: OpenAppCLI automation platform with AI Agent integration

extra.title: Universal Coverage, AI Native
extra.p1: OpenAppCLI supports 100+ application types across 5+ operating systems with 100% AI Agent compatibility.
extra.p2: Zero configuration required - plug and play for any application automation.

items.quote: OpenAppCLI revolutionized our automation workflow. The MCP protocol integration allows our AI agents to directly control applications, eliminating the need for complex parsing scripts.
items.name: Sarah Chen

items.quote: The 'Not Only Website' philosophy is a game-changer. We can now automate desktop, mobile, and game applications with a single unified platform. It's truly universal automation.
items.name: Michael Rodriguez

items.quote: Bidirectional application control through OpenAppCLI has transformed our testing infrastructure. We can now both extract data and control application behavior seamlessly.
items.name: Emily Watson

items.quote: The AI Agent native integration is incredible. Our AI assistants can now directly operate any application through MCP protocol, making automation truly intelligent.
items.name: David Kim

items.quote: From 20% to 100% application coverage is not just an improvement—it's a paradigm shift. OpenAppCLI has made universal application automation a reality.
items.name: Lisa Anderson

items.quote: The performance gains are remarkable. Element clicks are 3x faster, and the intelligent strategy selection ensures reliable automation across all platforms.
items.name: James Taylor
